_comment: PoC: All routes require Azure AD authentication. No anonymous access. Post-PoC: add /public/* and /api/public/* exceptions for SAWS.org-facing pages.

globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://*.saws.org https://*.search.windows.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'
